component1.title: Component 1: The Importance of Clear Vision

section1.title: Why 80% of Startups Fail
section1.subtitle: The Hidden Problem
section1.intro: It's not about effort. It's not about the product. It's not even about funding.
section1.problem: Most entrepreneurs work just as hard as the most successful ones. They're smart. They're committed. They execute.
section1.question: So why do 80% fail while companies like Amazon, Tesla, and Apple transform entire industries?
section1.answer: The difference isn't in execution. It's in VISION.

section2.title: The 5 Symptoms of Lack of Vision
section2.intro: You know you lack clear vision when you experience:

symptom1.title: Analysis Paralysis
symptom1.description: You spend weeks 'validating' ideas but never move forward. Every decision requires another meeting, another analysis, another opinion.

symptom2.title: Constant Pivots
symptom2.description: You change direction every quarter. 'Maybe we should focus on B2B... no, wait, B2C is better... actually, what if we do marketplace...'

symptom3.title: Resource Dispersion
symptom3.description: Your budget, time, and team are scattered across 10 different initiatives. Nothing gets the attention it needs to truly work.

symptom4.title: Constant Mental Fatigue
symptom4.description: You wake up every day wondering if you're working on the right thing. The uncertainty drains more energy than the work itself.

symptom5.title: Endless Pitch
symptom5.description: You can't explain what you do in less than 5 minutes. And even then, people don't 'get it.' Because you yourself aren't 100% clear.

section2.recognition: Sound familiar? You're not alone. This is the norm, not the exception.

section3.title: The Universal Pattern: Vision vs. Market Response

withoutVision.title: Companies WITHOUT Clear Vision from Day 1:
withoutVision.features: ✅ Good products|✅ Hard work|✅ Competent execution|❌ No clear north star

withVision.title: Companies WITH BHAG Vision from Day 1:
withVision.features: ✅ Good products (just like others)|✅ Hard work (just like others)|✅ Competent execution (just like others)|✅✅✅ CLEAR VISION that guides EVERYTHING

difference.title: THE DIFFERENCE IS NOT:
difference.notFactors: More initial capital (many started without investment)|Better product (competitors had comparable products)|Luck or timing (they faced massive crises)|Connections (many started as outsiders)
difference.factors: CLEAR VISION from day 1|BHAG that guided every decision for decades|Purpose greater than personal gain

section3.multiplier: Pattern validated across 15 companies. The multiplier ranges from 150x to 4000x higher valuation.

section4.title: Calculator: How Much is NOT Having Clear Vision Costing You?
section4.subtitle: Answer honestly. Nobody else sees this.
